title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the project's README file to include an 'Author' section with the relevant author information.
details: Open the README.md file in the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section at the end (or in an appropriate location if a convention exists). Include the author's name and, if applicable, contact information or a link to their profile (e.g., GitHub, email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file in a markdown previewer to confirm the 'Author' section is present, correctly formatted, and contains accurate information. Optionally, have another team member review for clarity and consistency.
